dbEquipBonuses.name: Channeler's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: Every 3s in combat: +0.5% Outgoing Healing and 0.5% Power. Max 10 stacks: 5% each.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Combatant's Advantage
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Combat Advantage. Max Stacks: 10.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Accuracy
dbEquipBonuses.description: Every 5s in combat, gain 100 Accuracy. After 2 minutes, ability no longer active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to gain 5000 Power for 10 seconds. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Skirmisher's Might
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you deal Combat Advantage damage with your powers, you have a 10% chance to gain 5000 Power for 10 seconds. (30 second cooldown)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Instinct
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is above 90%, your Outgoing Healing is increased by 9%. When your health is below 50%, Movement Speed is increased by 20%.

2 of Set: Encounter triggers Far-Influenced: Outgoing Damage +4% + random buff for 10s. (30s CD)

2 of Set: While in Pirates' Skyhold or Dread Sanctum, Movement Speed +12%. Each Prismatic Force stack (max 10): General +0.35% Power, DPS +0.5% Critical Severity, Healer +0.4% OOH, Tank +0.4% Awareness.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Blaspheme (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: Gain 70 Power, Defense, or Outgoing Healing (depending on role) for 15s when you dodge, block, sprint, or shadow slip (30s CD). When dealing Combat Advantage damage, 10% chance to gain 3% Base Damage Boost / -5% Incoming Damage / 3% Overall Outgoing Healing for 15s (30s CD).

2 of Set: In Pirates' Skyhold, Movement Speed +12%. Each Freebooter's Will stack (max 10): General +0.25% Power, DPS +0.35% Critical Severity, Healer +0.3% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank +0.3% Awareness.
2 of Set: Daily power 25% chance to immediately restore AP.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Celestial (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: When you use an encounter or daily power during combat, you gain a stack of Divine Charge for 15 seconds. Once you reach 5 stacks of Divine Charge, they are consumed and you are empowered with Divine Fury for 30 seconds, granting +5% Base Damage Boost and +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing. You may only have 1 stack of Divine Fury at a time.
2 of Set: Use encounter/daily during combat to gain Divine Charge stacks (15s each). 5 stacks consume and grant Divine Fury for 30s: +7.5% Base Damage Boost, +7.5% Overall Outgoing Healing.

2 of Set: When struck, Heal for 50% of Max HP over 30s. (30s CD)

dbEquipBonuses.name: Duergar Weapon Set (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: You and nearby allies are granted +2% Base Damage Boost, +2% Overall Outgoing Healing, +2% Incoming Damage reduction. May stack up to 5 times when allies are equipped with a set of similar weapons.
2 of Set: Use encounter/daily during combat to gain Scalebreaker's Wrath stacks. Each stack 20s: role-based bonus. 6 stacks empower for 30s.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Pilgrim (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: At the start of combat, your Base Damage Boost and Overall Outgoing Healing are increased by 1% for every enemy you faced when starting combat, to a max of 10% for 10s. If facing only one enemy at start, the bonus is +5% for 1 minute. When you kill an enemy, this buff will refresh.
